title: senecio spathulifolius subsp. pyrenaicus
intro: Senecio spathulifolius subsp. pyrenaicus, commonly known as Pyrenean ragwort, is a subspecies of the Senecio spathulifolius plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Senecio spathulifolius subsp. pyrenaicus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to support overall health and well-being.
